extract: The Heartwood (Japanese: 奥の森 Inner Forest) is an area located in the southeastern region of the Obsidian Fieldlands of Hisui. It connects to Oreburrow Tunnel and Obsidian Falls along the river to the north. It also connects to Nature's Pantry from Tidewater Dam to the north. The Grandtree Arena is found deep in the forest, where the noble Kleavor resides. In the future, in Sinnoh, it becomes part of Route 221 and Ramanas Park. Located in the western section of the woods is the Moss Rock, which allows the player to evolve their Eevee into Leafeon.
